The '''CLD-50 Cryo-Case''' was a popular form of [[cold crate]]. It was manufactured by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] and cost two hundred and fifty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="PSG" />
